data.body:
Student from another world, special video ep.2!

Shokuhou Misaki's trademark is Mental Out, which inflicts Confusion on enemies within a circular range! (However, they say that it doesn't work on Misaka Mikoto..!)

⬇️Promotional Video (HD)⬇️
[https://youtu.be/mb90jPcQbe4](https://youtu.be/mb90jPcQbe4)

#BlueArchive
